entry.title: New: RES25-318 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TWO (2) HI-BACK TRADITIONAL BENCHES AND TWO (2) BRONZE PLAQUES WITH INSCRIPTIONS TO READ, “DONATED BY THE FAMILY OF SAKA & FUDGIE KISHIMORI” AND “DONATED BY THE FAMILY OF FRED & CARLA DAUER,” VALUED AT $2,539.02, TO THE CITY FROM CARLA DAUER TO BE INSTALLED AT KAIMANA BEACH PARK.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
